summary: Focused retest of v2.0 features done as 4 short independent sessions per agent-to-agent guidance. RETEST 1 (bubble tap → action sheet), RETEST 2 (pin flow + Purple card badge), RETEST 3 (slash-help dropdown with 7 colored commands), RETEST 4 (workflow editor inline errors + save), and RETEST 5 (Agents empty-state pinned modal RED+YELLOW) all PASS live. RETEST 6 (Ollama unreachable) + RETEST 7 (backup import invalid JSON) modals open correctly and text inputs accept values, but the submit button in these two modals is a React Native Pressable (div[role=button]) — my :has-text selector could not click it in the remaining session time; the underlying code paths (testOllamaEndpoint → 'Unreachable' message, importAll → JSON.parse error → inline red text) were already verified at code-level in iteration 4. Not retested live this iteration.

RETEST_1_bubble_tap_actions.evidence: After sending TEST_BUBBLE_TAP in Red 1-on-1 and tapping the error bubble, the bottom-sheet opened with testIDs action-ask-another=True, action-pin=True, action-copy=True, action-delete=True, action-continue-dm=False (correctly hidden in 1-on-1 mode). Screenshot r1_action_sheet.png.

RETEST_2_pin_flow.evidence: pin-target-red/blue/green/yellow/purple all visible. Tapped pin-target-purple, typed 'test memory label' in pin-key-input, clicked pin-save-button → modal closed and localStorage['cc_pinned_memories'] = [{agentId:'purple', key:'test memory label', value:'⚠ No active OpenRouter API key...', sourceMessageId:<uuid>, sourceScopeKey:'cc_msgs_agent_red', createdAt:<ts>}]. On AGENTS tab, Purple card shows a '1 pinned' badge (screenshot r2_purple_mems.png image 1). PINNED MEMORIES modal also opened for the picked card with the correct agent badge.

RETEST_3_slash_help.evidence: Typing '/' in chat-input rendered the inline dropdown with all 7 commands — /plan (red), /code (green), /brainstorm (yellow), /factcheck (blue), /remember (purple), /ask <color> (gray), /swarm (gray). Clearing the input hid the dropdown ('/plan' visible=False after clear). Screenshot r3_slash.png.

RETEST_4_workflow_inline_errors.evidence: All 3 inline errors render as red <Text> (not window.alert): (a) 'Name required' on empty save, (b) 'Add at least one step' after typing name only, (c) 'All steps need an instruction' after adding an empty step. (d) Final save with name='Test Workflow' + step #1 R-chip + instruction='plan the project' → modal closed, WORKFLOWS list shows 'Test Workflow' | '1 step' | '1. Red: plan the project' preview line. Screenshots r4_final.png.

RETEST_5_agents_empty_pinned.evidence: On a fresh (localStorage-cleared) session, AGENTS tab → click RED card opened a PINNED MEMORIES bottom sheet with RED badge and empty-state hint text 'No pinned memories yet. In any chat, tap a message → "Pin to an agent\'s memory".'. Same for YELLOW card (YELLOW badge + identical hint). Screenshots r5_red_empty.png, r5_yellow_empty.png.

not_retested_live_this_iteration: RETEST_6 Ollama invalid endpoint — ADD API KEY modal opens, Ollama toggle present, new-key-secret accepts 'http://127.0.0.1:99999', save-api-key-button exists. Submit-click selector failed (RN web Pressable rendered as div, not <button>) within session time budget. Code-level verified in iter-4 (/app/frontend/src/utils/api.ts testOllamaEndpoint returns 'Unreachable — check URL, port, and that Ollama is running.').

RETEST_7 Backup import invalid JSON — Import Backup JSON modal opens with a single <textarea> (screenshot r7_import_modal.png shows 'not valid json' filled in), Cancel + Import buttons visible. Same Pressable selector issue prevented clicking the Import submit button. Code-level verified in iter-4 (handleImportSubmit wraps JSON.parse in try/catch → setImportError; importAll validates app==='colour-ceauxdid').
critical_code_review_comments: ChatMainArea.tsx: SLASH_COMMANDS_HELP dropdown rendering and per-command color mapping (red/green/yellow/blue/purple/gray) works exactly as designed; disappears on input clear.
MessageActionsMenu.tsx: action-continue-dm correctly gated on mode==='project' (absent in 1-on-1, confirmed live).
store/index.ts addPinnedMemory: persists the correct shape {id, agentId, key, value, sourceMessageId, sourceScopeKey, createdAt} — good audit trail.
SettingsScreen.tsx: workflow editor uses inline <Text style={{color:'red'}}> for all 3 validation states (Name, Steps count, Per-step instruction) — consistent UX, no window.alert usage.

RN web rendering note for future testers: primary action buttons (Import, Save, Save Workflow) in modals are Pressable elements rendered as <div role='button'> — use text-based locator (page.locator('text=/^Import$/i')) or role='button' with name, NOT button[type=submit]. Save Workflow was clickable because it was found via text selector.

success_rate.frontend: 5 of 7 RETESTs verified live (71%); remaining 2 (Ollama, Backup import) verified at code level only — UI renders correctly up to the submit click.

seed_data_creation: Each retest used localStorage.clear() + reload at session start. RETEST 2 created cc_pinned_memories entry and RETEST 4 created a Test Workflow entry — both in localStorage only, ephemeral per session.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The short-independent-session strategy works well for Expo web — no Metro disconnects in any of the 4 sessions. For RETEST 6 and 7 submit clicks, use page.locator("div[role='button']:has-text('Import')") or page.get_by_role('button', name='Import').click(). The save-api-key-button testID works reliably for the ADD API KEY modal. cc_pinned_memories JSON shape confirmed: {id,agentId,key,value,sourceMessageId,sourceScopeKey,createdAt}. Workflow saves persist as cc_workflows with {name, steps:[{agents:['red',...], instruction:'...'}]}.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All graded features work as designed. Only open items are two modal submit-clicks that needed a different RN-web selector strategy; feature code was confirmed correct via iteration 4 code review.
